mapper.select: select d.dept_seq as deptSeq, d.dept_code as deptCode, d.dept_name as deptName, d.parent_dept_seq as parentDeptSeq, d.auth_group as auth_group from departments d order by d.dept_seq

select u.id as id, u.name as name, u.dept_seq as deptSeq, d.dept_code as deptCode, d.dept_name as deptName, u.sysname as sysname,
r.rank_seq as rankSeq, r.rank_name as position, r.rank_order as rankOrder,
u.phone,
case when u.status = 'INACTIVE' then '휴직' when v.vac_type = '연차' then '연차'
when v.vac_type = '오전반차' then case when a.check_in is null then '오전반차' when a.check_out is not null then '퇴근' else '근무중' end
when v.vac_type = '오후반차' then case when a.check_in is null then null when a.check_out is not null then '퇴근' else '근무중' end
else case when a.check_in is null then null when a.check_out is not null then '퇴근' else '근무중' end
end as attendanceStatus
from users u left join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq left join attendance a on u.id = a.users_id and trunc(a.work_date) = trunc(sysdate)
left join ( select d.users_id, v.vac_type from draft_documents d join vacation v on d.doc_seq = v.doc_seq where d.doc_type = 'VACATION' and d.status = 'APPROVED' and trunc(sysdate) between trunc(v.start_date) and trunc(v.end_date) ) v on u.id = v.users_id
where u.status in ('ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE') order by r.rank_order asc, u.name asc
select dept_seq, dept_name, parent_dept_seq from departments where parent_dept_seq is not null order by parent_dept_seq

select u.id as id, u.name as name, u.dept_seq as deptSeq,
r.rank_seq as rankSeq, r.rank_name as position, r.rank_order as rankOrder,
u.sysname as sysname, u.phone as phone, u.email as email from users u left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where u.status in ('ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE') order by u.dept_seq asc, r.rank_order asc nulls last, u.name asc
